project_info.tagline: Un service professionnel, fiable et sur lequel vous pouvez compter !

meta.title: ATLAS Nettoyage Multiservice | Montréal
meta.description: Services de nettoyage professionnel, résidentiel et commercial à Montréal. Propreté, confiance et excellence. Écologique et responsable.
meta.instructions: CRITICAL: Do NOT include any 'Made with emergent' badges or texts anywhere. Update public/index.html metadata (title, description, og:image, og:title, og:description) to match Atlas Nettoyage Multiservice. Ensure no default emergent metadata remains.

typography.rules: Headings must use tracking-tight. Use font-light and font-black for contrast. Do not use generic sans for headings.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for sections.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento grids with asymmetry. Use col-span-full md:col-span-8 for hero elements.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp or minimal rounding (rounded-none or rounded-md) for a premium, authoritative look.

images.description: Professional cleaner, used as background for hero section with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60) to make white and lime green text pop.

sections.name: Header
sections.style: Sticky, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80, 1px bottom border border-slate-200. High contrast text.

sections.name: Hero
sections.style: Immersive, text-5xl md:text-7xl font-black text-white. Accent words in Lime Green. Generous spacing.

sections.name: Services
sections.style: Bento grid or asymmetrical cards. Hover: `-translate-y-1` and shadow-lg. Images used as card backgrounds or headers.

sections.name: Pourquoi Nous Choisir
sections.style: Dark section (bg-[#0A1128]) with lime green icons and white text. High contrast.

sections.name: Processus
sections.style: Step-by-step horizontal or vertical timeline layout.

sections.name: Témoignages & Galerie
sections.style: Simple marquee for testimonials, and a small masonry grid for before/after or cleaning shots.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.style: Shadcn Accordion customized with sharp borders.

sections.name: Contact & Devis
sections.style: Frontend only. Form triggers window.location.href = 'mailto:atlasmultiservicenettoyage@gmail.com?subject=Demande de devis&body=...'.

sections.name: Footer
sections.style: Massive py-20, Dark background (#0A1128), Lime text for links.

interactions_and_animations.hover: Buttons should have scale-105 active state. Links should underline or change to lime green on hover.

technical_requirements.seo: Configure Open Graph meta tags manually in the index.html or Helmet.
technical_requirements.testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, accordions).
